## [00:00 - 03:01]

Welcome to Operation Quick Start. This course, this program is all about getting you started fast, getting you an online business fast, getting you success fast, and just as important, having that be sustainable, having it be something that is going to last, that's built to last, that will grow over time. If you look around it's just obvious there's lots and lots of people that have online businesses and that are having success and you can have success too. I'm Jeff Walker and I started my first online business way back in 1996. I've been in business since then and I had an initial goal for my business and I hit that goal and then I grew and grew and eventually grew to 10 times that goal and then it kept on growing and it became 10 times that goal and then it kept growing and became 10 times that goal. I started my business from absolute desperation. I was to stay at home dad. I needed a change in my life. I needed to help support my family.
